overview.name: Avaris - NBA Betting Analytics Platform
overview.elevator_pitch: A transparent, data-driven NBA game prediction service powered by XGBoost machine learning, delivering daily picks with verifiable track records through an ad-supported blog that evolves into a premium subscription platform with automated prediction tools.
overview.industry_problem: Sports betting markets are saturated with tout services making questionable claims without transparent track records. Casual and serious bettors lack access to reliable, data-driven predictions with accountability. Existing prediction services hide their historical performance or cherry-pick winning streaks to mislead users.
solutions: Build XGBoost machine learning model trained on NBA Stats API data to predict game outcomes
Launch ad-supported blog with daily game predictions in SEO-optimized article format
Display transparent performance dashboard showing win rate, ROI, and complete historical results
Automate daily prediction pipeline using scheduled jobs to generate fresh picks each morning
Transition to subscription model once proven performance threshold (55%+ win rate) is achieved
Develop desktop prediction bot application for premium users to access predictions programmatically
Provide tiered service serving both casual bettors (free moneyline picks) and serious bettors (premium spreads and totals)
goals: Achieve 55%+ win rate over 100+ predictions to beat break-even threshold
Build transparent track record through publicly displayed historical performance
Launch MVP ad-supported blog with daily picks and performance dashboard
Generate 5k+ monthly visitors through SEO and content marketing
Reach $1k-5k monthly recurring revenue from ads and early subscribers within 12 months
Develop subscription tiers with premium features (spreads, totals, API access)

features.name: NBA Data Pipeline Foundation
features.description: Establish core data infrastructure for fetching, storing, and managing NBA statistics from the NBA Stats API. This forms the foundation for all ML predictions.

user_stories.title: Fetch Current Season Team Stats
user_stories.story: As a system, I want to fetch current season team statistics from NBA Stats API, so that the ML model has up-to-date data for predictions.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given the data pipeline is running, when a fetch job executes, then team statistics for the current season are retrieved and stored in Parquet format.
Given the NBA Stats API is rate-limited, when requests exceed limits, then the system implements exponential backoff and retries.

user_stories.title: Fetch Player Statistics
user_stories.story: As a system, I want to fetch player-level statistics including injuries and rest days, so that predictions account for roster availability.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given the data pipeline runs, when player data is fetched, then key player stats (points, assists, rebounds, usage rate) are stored.
Given injury data is available, when player status changes, then the system updates injury flags within 24 hours.

user_stories.title: Store Historical Data
user_stories.story: As a system, I want to store historical game data from past seasons, so that the ML model can be trained and backtested.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given historical data is requested, when the pipeline runs, then game results from 2022-23 and 2023-24 seasons are stored.
Given data is stored in Parquet files, when queried, then data retrieval completes in under 2 seconds for any query.

functional.description: System shall fetch team statistics including win rates, point differentials, offensive/defensive ratings from NBA Stats API.
System shall fetch player statistics including key metrics, injury reports, and rest days.
System shall store all data in Parquet file format for efficient querying.
System shall implement rate limiting and retry logic for API calls.

non_functional.description: Data pipeline shall complete daily refresh within 30 minutes.
System shall handle API rate limits gracefully without data loss.

dependencies.assumption: API remains free and accessible with documented rate limits.
Python 3.11+ is available for data processing scripts.

risks.title: NBA Stats API Rate Limiting
risks.overview: The NBA Stats API may impose strict rate limits that slow data collection.
risks.impact: Data freshness may be compromised, affecting prediction accuracy.
risks.mitigation: Implement caching, batch requests during off-peak hours, and store data locally to minimize API calls.

risks.title: API Schema Changes
risks.overview: NBA Stats API may change response schemas without notice.
risks.impact: Data pipeline breaks, requiring immediate fixes.
risks.mitigation: Implement schema validation and alerting for unexpected response formats.

success_criteria.title: Data Pipeline Operational
success_criteria.description: Data pipeline successfully fetches and stores team and player data daily.

success_criteria.title: Historical Data Available
success_criteria.description: At least 2 full seasons of historical game data are stored and queryable.

success_criteria.title: Data Freshness Maintained
success_criteria.description: Data is updated within 24 hours of latest NBA games being played.

features.name: XGBoost Model Training Infrastructure
features.description: Build the machine learning infrastructure for training, evaluating, and versioning XGBoost models for game outcome prediction.

user_stories.title: Train XGBoost Model
user_stories.story: As a data scientist, I want to train an XGBoost model on historical NBA data, so that the system can predict game outcomes.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given historical data is available, when training is initiated, then an XGBoost model is trained with specified hyperparameters.
Given training completes, when the model is saved, then model artifacts and metadata are stored with version information.

user_stories.title: Feature Engineering Pipeline
user_stories.story: As a data scientist, I want automated feature engineering, so that raw data is transformed into predictive features.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given raw game data, when feature engineering runs, then team performance metrics (L5, L10 form) are calculated.
Given situational data, when features are generated, then home/away splits, back-to-back flags, and travel distance are computed.

user_stories.title: Model Evaluation
user_stories.story: As a data scientist, I want to evaluate model performance with cross-validation, so that I can assess prediction accuracy.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given a trained model, when evaluation runs, then accuracy, log loss, and calibration metrics are computed.
Given evaluation results, when metrics are reported, then win rate percentage is clearly displayed.

functional.description: System shall train XGBoost models using team performance, player stats, and situational features.
System shall generate features including recent form (L5, L10), home/away splits, and back-to-back indicators.
System shall evaluate models using time-series cross-validation.
System shall version and store trained models with metadata.

non_functional.description: Model training shall complete within 10 minutes on standard hardware.
Feature engineering shall process a full season of data in under 5 minutes.

dependencies.assumption: XGBoost Python library is stable and maintained.
Data pipeline provides clean, structured data for training.

risks.title: Model Overfitting
risks.overview: Model may overfit to historical patterns that do not generalize.
risks.impact: Poor prediction accuracy on new games.
risks.mitigation: Use time-series cross-validation and regularization parameters.

risks.title: Insufficient Predictive Signal
risks.overview: Available features may not provide enough signal to beat 55% accuracy.
risks.impact: Product cannot launch if accuracy threshold is not met.
risks.mitigation: Iterate on feature engineering and explore additional data sources.

success_criteria.title: Model Training Functional
success_criteria.description: XGBoost model trains successfully on historical data.

success_criteria.title: Feature Pipeline Complete
success_criteria.description: All planned feature categories are implemented and tested.

success_criteria.title: Evaluation Metrics Available
success_criteria.description: Model evaluation produces accuracy, log loss, and calibration metrics.

features.name: Model Backtesting Framework
features.description: Implement comprehensive backtesting to validate model performance on historical seasons before live deployment.

user_stories.title: Backtest on Historical Seasons
user_stories.story: As a data scientist, I want to backtest the model on 2022-23 and 2023-24 seasons, so that I can validate it does not overfit.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given trained model, when backtesting runs, then predictions are generated for each game in test seasons.
Given backtest results, when analysis completes, then win rate, ROI, and maximum drawdown are calculated.

user_stories.title: Generate Backtest Reports
user_stories.story: As a product owner, I want detailed backtest reports, so that I can assess readiness for launch.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given backtest completes, when report is generated, then monthly performance breakdown is included.
Given backtest report, when reviewed, then confidence intervals for win rate are displayed.

functional.description: System shall simulate predictions on historical seasons without data leakage.
System shall calculate ROI assuming standard -110 betting odds.
System shall generate monthly and seasonal performance reports.

non_functional.description: Backtesting a full season shall complete within 5 minutes.

dependencies.assumption: Trained model is available for backtesting.

risks.title: Data Leakage in Backtesting
risks.overview: Improper backtesting may use future information, inflating results.
risks.impact: False confidence in model performance.
risks.mitigation: Implement strict temporal splits and code review for data leakage.

success_criteria.title: Backtest Validation Complete
success_criteria.description: Model achieves 55%+ win rate on held-out historical seasons.

success_criteria.title: No Data Leakage Detected
success_criteria.description: Code review confirms no future data is used in predictions.

features.name: Paper Trading System
features.description: Run live predictions without publishing to validate model performance on current season before public launch.

user_stories.title: Generate Daily Paper Predictions
user_stories.story: As a system, I want to generate predictions for today's games, so that performance can be tracked privately.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given games are scheduled for today, when prediction job runs, then predictions are generated and stored.
Given predictions exist, when games complete, then actual results are recorded and accuracy updated.

user_stories.title: Track Paper Trading Performance
user_stories.story: As a product owner, I want to track paper trading performance over time, so that I can decide when to launch publicly.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given paper trading data, when dashboard is viewed, then cumulative win rate and ROI are displayed.
Given 50+ predictions, when analysis runs, then statistical confidence in win rate is calculated.

functional.description: System shall generate predictions for all games each day automatically.
System shall record prediction results after games complete.
System shall provide paper trading dashboard showing running performance.

non_functional.description: Daily predictions shall be generated by 10 AM ET before lines move significantly.

dependencies.assumption: Fresh data is available for daily predictions.
Trained model is deployed for inference.

risks.title: Paper vs Live Performance Gap
risks.overview: Paper trading may not reflect real-world conditions.
risks.impact: Live performance may differ from paper results.
risks.mitigation: Paper trade for extended period (4+ weeks) before launch.

success_criteria.title: Paper Trading Operational
success_criteria.description: System generates and tracks predictions daily without manual intervention.

success_criteria.title: Launch Threshold Met
success_criteria.description: Paper trading achieves 55%+ win rate over 50+ predictions.

features.name: Next.js Blog Foundation
features.description: Build the core Next.js application infrastructure for the prediction blog, including routing, layouts, and basic pages.

user_stories.title: View Homepage with Today's Picks
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to see today's picks prominently on the homepage, so that I can quickly access current predictions.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I visit the homepage, when the page loads, then today's game predictions are displayed with probability percentages.
Given no games are scheduled today, when I visit the homepage, then a message indicates no games and shows next game date.

user_stories.title: Navigate Blog Structure
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want clear navigation to browse predictions by date, so that I can find historical picks.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am on any page, when I use the navigation, then I can access homepage, archives, and about sections.
Given I visit the archives, when I select a date, then predictions for that date are displayed.

functional.description: System shall display today's predictions on the homepage with team names and probability percentages.
System shall provide navigation to homepage, archives, and about pages.
System shall support responsive design for desktop and mobile viewing.

non_functional.description: Homepage shall load in under 2 seconds on desktop connections.
Site shall achieve 90+ Lighthouse performance score.

dependencies.assumption: Next.js 14+ with App Router is used.
React 19 stable release is available.
Tailwind v4 is stable and documented.

risks.title: Framework Version Instability
risks.overview: New versions of Next.js, React 19, or Tailwind v4 may have bugs.
risks.impact: Development delays due to framework issues.
risks.mitigation: Pin versions and monitor release notes for breaking changes.

success_criteria.title: Homepage Functional
success_criteria.description: Homepage displays today's picks with proper formatting.

success_criteria.title: Navigation Complete
success_criteria.description: All core navigation links are functional.

success_criteria.title: Performance Target Met
success_criteria.description: Lighthouse performance score is 90+.

features.name: MDX Daily Picks Pages
features.description: Implement SEO-optimized daily prediction pages using MDX format for automated content generation.

user_stories.title: View Game Prediction Page
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to view detailed prediction pages for each game, so that I can understand the analysis behind picks.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given a game prediction page exists, when I visit the URL, then team matchup, prediction, and probability are displayed.
Given the page loads, when I scroll, then key factors influencing the prediction are shown.

user_stories.title: Find Predictions via Search Engines
user_stories.story: As a potential user, I want to find prediction pages through search engines, so that I discover the service organically.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given prediction pages are published, when indexed by search engines, then pages appear for '[Team A] vs [Team B] prediction' queries.
Given a prediction page, when viewed, then proper meta tags (title, description, Open Graph) are present.

functional.description: System shall generate MDX files for each daily prediction automatically.
Prediction pages shall include team matchup, prediction pick, probability percentage, and key factors.
Pages shall have SEO-optimized URLs in format /predictions/[date]/[team-a]-vs-[team-b].
Pages shall include proper meta tags for search engine and social media optimization.

non_functional.description: MDX generation shall complete within 5 minutes for all daily games.
Generated pages shall pass Google Search Console validation.

dependencies.assumption: Blog infrastructure is ready for MDX integration.
Daily predictions are generated and available.

risks.title: SEO Ranking Competition
risks.overview: Established sports betting sites dominate search rankings.
risks.impact: Organic traffic growth may be slower than expected.
risks.mitigation: Focus on long-tail keywords and unique value proposition (transparent track record).

success_criteria.title: MDX Generation Automated
success_criteria.description: Daily prediction pages are auto-generated without manual intervention.

success_criteria.title: Pages SEO Optimized
success_criteria.description: All pages pass SEO audit with proper meta tags and structured data.

features.name: Performance Dashboard
features.description: Public-facing dashboard displaying historical prediction performance including win rate, ROI, and recent results.

user_stories.title: View Overall Performance
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to see overall prediction performance metrics, so that I can evaluate the service's track record.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I visit the performance dashboard, when the page loads, then overall win rate and total predictions are displayed.
Given performance data exists, when displayed, then ROI percentage assuming standard betting is shown.

user_stories.title: View Recent Results
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to see recent prediction results, so that I can verify current performance.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given recent predictions exist, when I view the dashboard, then last 10 predictions with outcomes are displayed.
Given a prediction result, when displayed, then team names, pick, and win/loss indicator are shown.

user_stories.title: View Monthly Breakdown
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to see monthly performance breakdown, so that I can assess consistency.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given multiple months of data exist, when I view monthly breakdown, then win rate per month is displayed.
Given monthly data, when displayed, then trends are visualized (chart or graph).

functional.description: Dashboard shall display overall win rate, total predictions, and ROI.
Dashboard shall show last 10 prediction results with outcomes.
Dashboard shall provide monthly performance breakdown.
Dashboard shall visualize performance trends over time.

non_functional.description: Dashboard shall update within 1 hour of game completion.
Dashboard shall load in under 3 seconds.

dependencies.assumption: Historical prediction data is available for display.
Blog infrastructure supports dashboard pages.

risks.title: Performance Below Expectations
risks.overview: Public dashboard may show poor performance during bad streaks.
risks.impact: Trust and credibility damaged during losing periods.
risks.mitigation: Emphasize long-term performance and statistical variance in dashboard copy.

success_criteria.title: Dashboard Displays Metrics
success_criteria.description: All required performance metrics are visible and accurate.

success_criteria.title: Data Updates Automatically
success_criteria.description: Dashboard reflects latest results within 1 hour of game completion.

success_criteria.title: Performance Load Time Met
success_criteria.description: Dashboard loads within 3 seconds.

features.name: Automated Prediction Pipeline
features.description: Implement end-to-end automation for daily predictions using scheduled jobs (cron/GitHub Actions).

user_stories.title: Automatic Daily Predictions
user_stories.story: As a system operator, I want predictions generated automatically each morning, so that no manual intervention is required.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given it is a game day, when the scheduled job runs, then predictions are generated for all games.
Given predictions are generated, when the job completes, then MDX files are created and committed to repository.

user_stories.title: Automatic Result Recording
user_stories.story: As a system, I want game results recorded automatically, so that performance tracking stays current.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given games have completed, when the results job runs, then outcomes are fetched and recorded.
Given results are recorded, when dashboard data updates, then win/loss status is accurate.

user_stories.title: Pipeline Failure Alerting
user_stories.story: As a system operator, I want to be alerted if the pipeline fails, so that issues can be addressed quickly.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given a pipeline step fails, when failure is detected, then an email or Slack notification is sent.
Given an alert is sent, when reviewed, then error details and failing step are included.

functional.description: System shall run prediction pipeline daily at 8 AM ET via scheduled job.
System shall automatically commit generated MDX files to repository.
System shall fetch and record game results daily after games complete.
System shall send alerts on pipeline failures via email or Slack.

non_functional.description: Pipeline shall complete within 30 minutes of scheduled start time.
Pipeline shall achieve 99% uptime over 30-day rolling period.

dependencies.assumption: GitHub Actions is available for scheduling and execution.
Data pipeline, model, and MDX generation are functional.

risks.title: Pipeline Reliability
risks.overview: External dependencies (API, GitHub Actions) may cause failures.
risks.impact: Predictions not published, damaging user trust.
risks.mitigation: Implement retries, fallback mechanisms, and comprehensive alerting.

success_criteria.title: Pipeline Runs Daily
success_criteria.description: Automated pipeline executes daily without manual intervention.

success_criteria.title: Alerts Functional
success_criteria.description: Failure alerts are received within 5 minutes of pipeline error.

success_criteria.title: Uptime Target Met
success_criteria.description: Pipeline achieves 99% uptime over first 30 days.

features.name: Google AdSense Integration
features.description: Integrate Google AdSense for ad monetization on the blog.

user_stories.title: Display Ads on Pages
user_stories.story: As a site owner, I want ads displayed on blog pages, so that the site generates ad revenue.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given AdSense is integrated, when a visitor loads a page, then ads are displayed in designated slots.
Given ads are displayed, when viewed, then ads do not obstruct primary content.

user_stories.title: Non-Intrusive Ad Placement
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want ads that do not interfere with content consumption, so that my experience is not degraded.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given ads are displayed, when I read prediction content, then ads are placed in sidebar or between sections.
Given I am on mobile, when viewing the page, then ads are appropriately sized and positioned.

functional.description: System shall integrate Google AdSense code on all blog pages.
Ad placements shall be in sidebar and between content sections.
System shall support responsive ad units for mobile and desktop.

non_functional.description: Ad loading shall not increase page load time by more than 500ms.
Ads shall comply with Google AdSense policies.

dependencies.assumption: AdSense account is approved and active.
Blog pages are ready for ad integration.

risks.title: AdSense Approval Delay
risks.overview: Google AdSense approval may take time or be rejected.
risks.impact: Monetization delayed, affecting revenue targets.
risks.mitigation: Submit for approval early; have alternative ad networks as backup.

risks.title: Low Ad Revenue Initially
risks.overview: Low traffic means low ad revenue at launch.
risks.impact: Revenue targets may not be met initially.
risks.mitigation: Focus on traffic growth through SEO and content marketing.

success_criteria.title: Ads Displaying Correctly
success_criteria.description: Ads appear on all blog pages without layout issues.

success_criteria.title: AdSense Approved
success_criteria.description: Google AdSense account is approved and generating impressions.

success_criteria.title: Performance Impact Minimal
success_criteria.description: Page load time increase is under 500ms with ads.

features.name: MVP Public Launch
features.description: Official public launch of the ad-supported prediction blog after achieving performance threshold.

user_stories.title: Access Public Blog
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to access the publicly available prediction blog, so that I can use the service.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given the site is launched, when I visit the URL, then the homepage loads with today's picks.
Given I am a search engine user, when I search for predictions, then relevant pages may appear in results.

user_stories.title: Trust Through Transparency
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to see the full track record including losses, so that I can trust the service is honest.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I visit the performance dashboard, when viewing results, then all predictions including losses are displayed.
Given the track record, when reviewed, then no cherry-picking or hidden results are evident.

functional.description: Site shall be deployed to production hosting environment.
All core features (homepage, predictions, dashboard) shall be functional.
Site shall have proper domain and SSL certificate.

non_functional.description: Site shall achieve 99.5% uptime.
Site shall handle at least 1000 concurrent visitors.

dependencies.assumption: All MVP features are complete and tested.
Domain is registered and hosting provider selected.

risks.title: Launch Performance Issues
risks.overview: Unexpected traffic or bugs may cause issues at launch.
risks.impact: Poor first impression, user loss.
risks.mitigation: Soft launch to limited audience first; monitor closely.

success_criteria.title: Site Live and Accessible
success_criteria.description: Site is publicly accessible at production domain.

success_criteria.title: Core Features Functional
success_criteria.description: All MVP features work correctly in production.

success_criteria.title: Performance Threshold Met
success_criteria.description: Model has achieved 55%+ win rate over 50+ predictions before launch.

features.name: Email Newsletter System
features.description: Build email capture and daily newsletter delivery for owned audience building.

user_stories.title: Subscribe to Newsletter
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to subscribe to the daily picks newsletter, so that I receive predictions in my inbox.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am on the homepage, when I enter my email and submit, then I am subscribed to the newsletter.
Given I subscribe, when confirmation is sent, then I receive a welcome email.

user_stories.title: Receive Daily Picks Email
user_stories.story: As a subscriber, I want to receive daily picks via email, so that I don't have to visit the site.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am subscribed, when picks are published, then I receive an email with today's predictions.
Given the email is received, when I read it, then team matchups and predictions are clearly formatted.

user_stories.title: Unsubscribe from Newsletter
user_stories.story: As a subscriber, I want to easily unsubscribe, so that I can stop receiving emails.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I receive a newsletter email, when I click unsubscribe, then I am removed from the list.
Given I unsubscribe, when confirmed, then I no longer receive newsletter emails.

functional.description: System shall provide email subscription form on homepage and prediction pages.
System shall send daily newsletter with predictions each morning.
System shall support double opt-in for subscriptions.
System shall include one-click unsubscribe in all emails.

non_functional.description: Newsletter delivery shall complete within 1 hour of predictions being published.
Email deliverability shall exceed 95%.

dependencies.assumption: Email service (e.g., Resend, SendGrid) is configured.
Daily predictions trigger newsletter sending.

risks.title: Email Deliverability Issues
risks.overview: Emails may be marked as spam or not delivered.
risks.impact: Subscriber engagement drops.
risks.mitigation: Use reputable ESP, implement SPF/DKIM, warm up sending domain.

success_criteria.title: Subscription Functional
success_criteria.description: Users can successfully subscribe and receive welcome email.

success_criteria.title: Daily Newsletter Delivered
success_criteria.description: Newsletter is sent daily with predictions to all subscribers.

success_criteria.title: Deliverability Target Met
success_criteria.description: Email deliverability exceeds 95%.

features.name: Social Media Integration
features.description: Add social sharing capabilities and automated posting to Twitter/X for audience growth.

user_stories.title: Share Predictions on Social
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to share predictions on social media, so that I can discuss with friends.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am on a prediction page, when I click share, then I can share to Twitter/X with pre-filled text.
Given I share to social media, when the post is created, then it includes a link back to the prediction page.

user_stories.title: Auto-Post Daily Picks
user_stories.story: As a site owner, I want daily picks auto-posted to Twitter/X, so that social followers are notified.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given predictions are published, when the pipeline completes, then a summary tweet is posted.
Given a tweet is posted, when viewed, then it includes game count and link to homepage.

functional.description: Prediction pages shall include social share buttons for Twitter/X.
System shall auto-post daily picks summary to Twitter/X.
Social posts shall use Open Graph meta tags for rich previews.

non_functional.description: Auto-posts shall occur within 15 minutes of predictions being published.

dependencies.assumption: Twitter/X developer account with posting permissions.

risks.title: Twitter API Changes
risks.overview: Twitter/X API pricing or access may change.

success_criteria.description: Social share buttons work correctly on all prediction pages.

success_criteria.title: Auto-Posting Active

features.name: Supabase User Authentication
features.description: Implement user authentication using Supabase for future premium features.

user_stories.title: Create User Account
user_stories.story: As a visitor, I want to create an account, so that I can access member features in the future.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am on the signup page, when I submit email and password, then my account is created.
Given I sign up, when account is created, then I receive a verification email.

user_stories.title: Login to Account
user_stories.story: As a registered user, I want to log in, so that I can access my account.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I have an account, when I enter valid credentials, then I am logged in.
Given I am logged in, when I view the site, then my logged-in status is indicated.

user_stories.title: Password Reset
user_stories.story: As a user, I want to reset my password if forgotten, so that I can regain account access.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I forgot my password, when I request reset, then I receive a reset email.
Given I receive reset email, when I set new password, then I can log in with new password.

functional.description: System shall support email/password authentication via Supabase.
System shall require email verification for new accounts.
System shall support password reset via email.
System shall maintain secure session management.

non_functional.description: Authentication flows shall complete in under 3 seconds.
Password storage shall use bcrypt with appropriate cost factor.

dependencies.assumption: Supabase project is configured with auth enabled.

risks.title: Authentication Security
risks.overview: Security vulnerabilities in auth implementation.
risks.impact: User accounts compromised.
risks.mitigation: Use Supabase built-in auth; follow security best practices.

success_criteria.title: Registration Functional
success_criteria.description: Users can successfully create and verify accounts.

success_criteria.title: Login Functional
success_criteria.description: Users can log in and out successfully.

success_criteria.title: Password Reset Works
success_criteria.description: Users can reset passwords via email.

features.name: User Profile Management
features.description: Allow users to manage their profile and preferences.

user_stories.title: View Profile
user_stories.story: As a logged-in user, I want to view my profile, so that I can see my account information.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am logged in, when I visit my profile, then I see my email and account creation date.

user_stories.story: As a user, I want to manage email preferences, so that I control what emails I receive.

Given I opt out of newsletter, when next newsletter sends, then I do not receive it.

functional.description: System shall provide user profile page showing account details.
System shall allow users to update email notification preferences.

non_functional.description: Profile page shall load in under 2 seconds.

dependencies.assumption: Authentication system is functional.

success_criteria.title: Profile Page Accessible

success_criteria.title: Preferences Saveable

features.name: Stripe Payment Integration
features.description: Integrate Stripe for subscription payment processing.

user_stories.title: Subscribe to Premium
user_stories.story: As a user, I want to subscribe to premium tier, so that I can access advanced predictions.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am logged in, when I select premium subscription, then I am directed to Stripe checkout.
Given I complete payment, when checkout succeeds, then my account is upgraded to premium.

user_stories.title: Manage Subscription
user_stories.story: As a subscriber, I want to manage my subscription, so that I can cancel or change plans.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am a premium user, when I visit subscription settings, then I can view my plan details.
Given I want to cancel, when I initiate cancellation, then my subscription is cancelled at period end.

user_stories.title: View Payment History
user_stories.story: As a subscriber, I want to see payment history, so that I can track my spending.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am subscribed, when I view payment history, then past invoices are displayed.

functional.description: System shall integrate Stripe for subscription payments.
System shall support monthly subscription billing.
System shall provide subscription management portal.
System shall handle webhook events for subscription lifecycle.

non_functional.description: Payment processing shall be PCI compliant via Stripe.
Subscription status updates shall occur within 5 minutes of payment events.

dependencies.assumption: Stripe account is verified and products configured.
Users are authenticated before subscribing.

risks.title: Payment Failures
risks.overview: Users may experience payment failures.
risks.impact: Lost revenue and frustrated users.
risks.mitigation: Implement retry logic and clear error messaging.

success_criteria.title: Checkout Functional
success_criteria.description: Users can complete subscription checkout via Stripe.

success_criteria.title: Subscription Status Accurate
success_criteria.description: User subscription status updates correctly after payment.

success_criteria.title: Cancellation Works
success_criteria.description: Users can cancel subscriptions through the portal.

features.name: Premium Spread and Totals Predictions
features.description: Add spread and totals predictions as premium-only features.

user_stories.title: View Spread Predictions
user_stories.story: As a premium user, I want to see spread predictions, so that I can bet against the spread.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am premium, when I view a prediction, then spread prediction is displayed.
Given I am free user, when I view a prediction, then spread prediction is locked/blurred.

user_stories.title: View Totals Predictions
user_stories.story: As a premium user, I want to see over/under predictions, so that I can bet on totals.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am premium, when I view a prediction, then over/under prediction is displayed.
Given I am free user, when I view a prediction, then totals prediction is locked/blurred.

functional.description: System shall generate spread predictions using enhanced model.
System shall generate over/under predictions for game totals.
System shall gate spread and totals predictions behind premium subscription.

non_functional.description: Premium predictions shall be generated alongside moneyline predictions.

dependencies.assumption: Model can be extended for spread and totals predictions.
Subscription status determines feature access.

risks.title: Spread Model Accuracy
risks.overview: Spread predictions may not achieve same accuracy as moneyline.
risks.impact: Premium value proposition weakened.
risks.mitigation: Backtest thoroughly before launch; be transparent about different accuracy.

success_criteria.title: Spread Predictions Generated
success_criteria.description: Spread predictions are generated daily for premium users.

success_criteria.title: Totals Predictions Generated
success_criteria.description: Over/under predictions are generated daily for premium users.

success_criteria.title: Feature Gating Works
success_criteria.description: Free users cannot access premium predictions.

features.name: Prediction API for Premium Users
features.description: Provide API access for power users to retrieve predictions programmatically.

user_stories.title: Generate API Key
user_stories.story: As a premium user, I want to generate an API key, so that I can access predictions programmatically.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am premium, when I visit API settings, then I can generate an API key.
Given I generate a key, when displayed, then I can copy it to clipboard.

user_stories.title: Fetch Predictions via API
user_stories.story: As a developer, I want to fetch predictions via API, so that I can integrate with my tools.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I have an API key, when I call /api/predictions, then I receive today's predictions in JSON.
Given I call the API, when response returns, then it includes moneyline, spread, and totals predictions.

user_stories.title: API Rate Limiting
user_stories.story: As a system, I want to rate limit API requests, so that resources are not abused.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given a user makes many requests, when rate limit exceeded, then 429 response is returned.
Given rate limit is enforced, when user waits, then requests succeed again.

functional.description: System shall allow premium users to generate API keys.
API shall return predictions in JSON format.
API shall include all prediction types (moneyline, spread, totals).
API shall enforce rate limits per user.

non_functional.description: API response time shall be under 500ms.
Rate limit shall be 100 requests per hour per user.

dependencies.assumption: Premium status determines API access.
All prediction types are available.

risks.title: API Abuse
risks.overview: Users may share API keys or exceed intended usage.
risks.impact: Server resources strained.
risks.mitigation: Implement rate limiting and key rotation capabilities.

success_criteria.title: API Key Generation Works
success_criteria.description: Premium users can generate and manage API keys.

success_criteria.title: API Returns Predictions
success_criteria.description: API endpoint returns predictions in correct JSON format.

success_criteria.title: Rate Limiting Enforced
success_criteria.description: Excessive requests are rate limited with appropriate response.

features.name: Early Access Predictions
features.description: Provide premium users with early access to predictions before public release.

user_stories.title: View Early Predictions
user_stories.story: As a premium user, I want early access to predictions, so that I can bet before lines move.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am premium, when predictions are generated, then I see them 2 hours before free users.
Given early access period, when I view predictions, then 'Early Access' badge is displayed.

user_stories.title: Email Early Predictions
user_stories.story: As a premium subscriber, I want early predictions emailed, so that I'm notified immediately.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am premium with newsletter enabled, when predictions generate, then I receive email 2 hours before free users.

functional.description: System shall release predictions to premium users 2 hours before free users.
System shall mark early access predictions with visual indicator.
System shall send early access email to premium subscribers.

non_functional.description: Early access timing shall be accurate within 5 minutes.

dependencies.assumption: Premium status determines early access.
Newsletter infrastructure supports timed sending.

success_criteria.title: Early Access Timing Accurate
success_criteria.description: Premium users see predictions 2 hours before free users.

success_criteria.title: Early Email Sent
success_criteria.description: Premium subscribers receive early access email.

features.name: Desktop Prediction Bot Application
features.description: Downloadable desktop application that provides automated prediction access similar to sneaker bots.

user_stories.title: Download Prediction Bot
user_stories.story: As a premium user, I want to download the prediction bot, so that I can run it locally.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given I am premium, when I visit downloads page, then I can download the bot for my OS.
Given I download the bot, when I run it, then it prompts for API key authentication.

user_stories.title: Receive Desktop Notifications
user_stories.story: As a bot user, I want desktop notifications when predictions are ready, so that I'm alerted immediately.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given the bot is running, when new predictions are available, then a desktop notification appears.
Given I click the notification, when the app opens, then today's predictions are displayed.

user_stories.title: View Predictions in Bot
user_stories.story: As a bot user, I want to view predictions in the desktop app, so that I don't need to visit the website.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given the bot is authenticated, when I open it, then today's predictions are displayed.
Given predictions are shown, when I view details, then all prediction types are visible.

functional.description: System shall provide downloadable desktop application for Windows and macOS.
Bot shall authenticate using API key.
Bot shall display desktop notifications for new predictions.
Bot shall display all prediction types with probabilities.
Bot shall auto-update when new versions are available.

non_functional.description: Bot shall use minimal system resources (under 100MB RAM).
Bot shall start up in under 5 seconds.

dependencies.assumption: Desktop framework is selected and configured.
API is available for bot to fetch predictions.

risks.title: Cross-Platform Compatibility
risks.overview: Desktop app may have issues on different OS versions.
risks.impact: Support burden increases.
risks.mitigation: Thorough testing on target platforms; provide clear system requirements.

risks.title: Distribution and Updates
risks.overview: Managing desktop app distribution and updates is complex.
risks.impact: Users may run outdated versions.
risks.mitigation: Implement auto-update mechanism; notify users of available updates.

success_criteria.title: Bot Downloadable
success_criteria.description: Premium users can download bot for Windows and macOS.

success_criteria.title: Authentication Works
success_criteria.description: Bot authenticates using API key successfully.

success_criteria.title: Notifications Functional
success_criteria.description: Desktop notifications appear when predictions are ready.

success_criteria.title: Predictions Display
success_criteria.description: All prediction types are viewable in the bot.

features.name: V1.0 Stable Release
features.description: Official stable release with full feature set including ad-supported free tier and premium subscription with bot.

user_stories.title: Access Complete Platform
user_stories.story: As a user, I want access to the complete prediction platform, so that I have all features available.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given v1.0 is released, when I visit the site, then all documented features are available.
Given I am a free user, when I use the site, then moneyline predictions and performance dashboard are accessible.
Given I am premium, when I use the platform, then all features including bot are accessible.

user_stories.title: Reliable Performance
user_stories.story: As a user, I want reliable service performance, so that I can depend on daily predictions.

acceptance_criteria.criteria: Given the platform is live, when I access it, then uptime exceeds 99.5%.
Given predictions are published, when I view them, then accuracy continues to exceed 55% threshold.

functional.description: All features from v0.1.0 through v0.10.0 shall be complete and tested.
Documentation shall be complete for all features.
Free and premium tiers shall have clear feature differentiation.

non_functional.description: Platform shall achieve 99.5% uptime.
Prediction accuracy shall maintain 55%+ win rate.
Platform shall support 10,000+ monthly active users.

dependencies.assumption: All features from previous versions are complete.

risks.title: Market Competition
risks.overview: Competitors may launch similar transparent prediction services.
risks.impact: Market differentiation reduced.
risks.mitigation: Build brand and community; continue innovation on features.

success_criteria.title: All Features Complete
success_criteria.description: All planned features are implemented and tested.

success_criteria.title: Performance Targets Met
success_criteria.description: Model maintains 55%+ win rate; uptime exceeds 99.5%.

success_criteria.title: Revenue Generation
success_criteria.description: Platform generates $1k+ MRR from ads and subscriptions.

success_criteria.title: User Growth
success_criteria.description: Platform achieves 5k+ monthly visitors.
